examples: she satisfied his need for affection
God has no need of men to accomplish His work
there is a demand for jobs

meanings.definition: anything that is necessary but lacking
examples: he had sufficient means to meet his simple needs
I tried to supply his wants

meanings.definition: the psychological feature that arouses an organism to action toward a desired goal; the reason for the action; that which gives purpose and direction to behavior
examples: we did not understand his motivation
he acted with the best of motives

meanings.definition: a state of extreme poverty or destitution
examples: a general state of need exists among the homeless

meanings.definition: require as useful, just, or proper
examples: It takes nerve to do what she did
This job asks a lot of patience and skill
This position demands a lot of personal sacrifice
This dinner calls for a spectacular dessert
This intervention does not postulate a patient's consent
This piano wants the attention of a competent tuner

meanings.definition: have or feel a need for
